name: Entity Attach
desc: Attaches an entity to another (player on horse, animal on leash, leach knot).

fields.name: vehicleId
fields.desc: Entity ID of the vehicle (-1 for detach)

implementation.overview: Attaches a passenger entity to a vehicle (horse, boat, leash). vehicleId=-1 detaches. Detected by AutoMount modules for horse riding and BoatFly for boat detection. No module specifically targets S1B in the primary source codebases — the vanilla handler updates entity.ridingEntity automatically.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S1BPacketEntityAttach)
modules.purpose: Server sends S1BPacketEntityAttach to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
